degraded.note: Mid-iterate the shipwright-security plugin's local .venv hit OneDrive hardlink-failure on certifi, blocking every Bash call. Resolved out-of-band by `uv cache clean` + branch re-checkout. Work itself was uncompromised; verification gates ran cleanly afterward. Recommend setting UV_LINK_MODE=copy permanently on OneDrive-synced Windows hosts (captured in conventions.md learnings).
